productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Green Check Shirt
description: Style Note Refresh your casual-ready portfolio with this indian terrain shirt. The precisely created premium shirt with trim lines, exclusive tailoring and soft fabric is designed to ensure you look your best even on the weekends Product Details Green, blue and white checked shirt that has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, yoke at the back, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
